# Lakers Extend First-Round Dominance | YES | HIGH Confidence

The **Los Angeles Lakers have secured a commanding 2-0 series lead** over the Houston Rockets in the first round of the 2026 NBA Playoffs, following their 101-94 victory on Tuesday night.[1] LeBron James led the effort with 28 points, eight rebounds, and seven assists.[1]

signals.headline: Championship odds implications:** The Lakers are currently listed at 13-1 to win the NBA championship, while the Rockets
signals.raw: Championship odds implications:** The Lakers are currently listed at 13-1 to win the NBA championship, while the Rockets sit at 11-1.[6] A Lakers series victory would advance them to the Western Conference semifinals against either the Oklahoma City Thunder (24-2, favored at +110) or the Denver Nuggets (13-1).[6]
